action: Recover and preserve the rule that effective queue state must be reconstructed from the canonical baseline plus later append-only team updates and evidence.
selection_basis: The canonical ACTIVE_QUEUE snapshot predates multiple team-owned queue updates. Without an explicit continuity rule, later runs could erase valid work conceptually by reading only the baseline and treating absence as nonexistence.
memory_recovered: ACTIVE_QUEUE.json is a dated canonical baseline, not sufficient evidence of all later team work. Effective state requires replaying later append-only queue updates, checking their evidence and commits, and preserving unresolved conflicts rather than overwriting them.
contradictions_resolved: A record can be absent from the baseline yet exist as a valid later event.
Append-only team updates coordinate shared state without violating the no-overwrite rule.
A peer trigger attempt or schedule acknowledgement is not evidence that the peer completed a run.

observed: M-010 is a later continuity update dated 2026-07-13 and explicitly declares append-only queue policy
CURRENT_STATE.json requires owned updates and evidence-backed coordination
inferred: current effective queue state is event-sourced until explicit canonical compaction
proposed: build a deterministic queue-state materializer and canonical compaction validator
superseded: reading ACTIVE_QUEUE.json alone as complete current state
unresolved: canonical incorporation status of existing queue updates
continuity-index incorporation of CM-0013 through CM-0017

privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata, paths, abstract queue semantics, and evidence rules only. Raw private chat, health or pet-health material, credentials, personal identifiers, and unreviewed uploads remain excluded.
canonical_queue_update_policy: Append-only team-owned update; operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json was not overwritten.
next_action: Implement a deterministic queue-state materializer that validates ownership and references, retains conflicts, and emits a candidate canonical compaction with complete provenance.
